name: XM1014 | 滑流
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. It has been custom painted with smoky greys and vibrant blues. Patience, Elliott; they still have a role to play... - The Mercenary and The Serpent Part 2
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这件武器用烟熏灰与亮蓝色进行了自定义涂装。 埃利奥特，别着急。他们还有戏要唱呢... - 雇佣兵与巨蟒，第 2 部
